0x0	addi sp,zero,256	00010000000000000000000100010011
0x4	addi ra,zero,15	00000000111100000000000010010011
0x8	addi sp,zero,10	00000000101000000000000100010011
0xc	beq ra,sp,end	00000000001000001000011001100011
0x10	sub ra,ra,sp	01000000001000001000000010110011
0x14	jal zero,loop	11111111100111111111000001101111
0x18	sw ra,0(sp)	00000000000100010010000000100011
0x1c	jalr zero,ra,0	00000000000000001000000001100111
0x20	beq zero,zero,0	00000000000000000000000001100011
